business_ideas.idea: Virtual team building experiences via Zoom (escape rooms, improv classes, wardrobe makeovers).
Team Rodery: curated team bonding experiences (tastings, classes, inclusion lessons).
NiceBreak.fun: recurring paid team events ($2k+/month for 25-50 person companies).
Paid financial newsletters with tiered pricing ($49 to $35k+, $550M revenue at Agora Financial).

predictions.text: Clubhouse will fail due to retention problems from the live-only content constraint and interestingness problem.
Virtual team building will become significant revenue driver as remote work becomes permanent.
